no: Similar to quest packs, but more involved in adding to, using, or altering vanilla content Unfinished Business BG2 , How to Fix Broken Minsc/Boo Quest (BeamDog). BG2’s version restores a quest where Boo is kidnapped (!) and Minsc and co must rescue him, for what is Minsc without Boo?Install Unfinished Business for BG2 after Imoen 4 Ever.

conflicts.reason: IR main conflicts with Extended ToB Item Descriptions. IR main (cn:0) No conflict.
New Ascension has separate and better Restored Bhaalspawn Powers component

ki.description: External translation file missing. Harmless — falls back to bundled translations.

passive.desc: +10% Hide in Shadows and Move Silently
+1 THAC0 and +1 speed factor per 10 levels (at 1, 11, 21, 31)

restrictions.items: No Charm Animal. No ranger spellcasting (replaced by innate spells). No dual-classing.

spellRestrictions.note: No ranger spellcasting. Gains innate divine spells instead: CLW+Armour of Faith (lv8), Luck+Remove Fear (lv10), DUHM (lv12).

passive.desc: +10% Hide in Shadows and Move Silently

activated.effects: +2 THAC0, +2 damage, -2 AC, +15 HP. Immune to charm, hold, fear, maze, imprisonment, stun, sleep. 60 sec. Winded after: -2 hit/damage, +2 AC.
Summons scaling animal: Wild Dog → Wolf → Dire Wolf → Pack Leader. Lasts 3 rounds + 1/level.
Charm Animal (gains extra uses faster than base ranger).

restrictions.items: Cannot wear any armor. Many weapons limited to 1 pip. No large shields.

new: Ranger dedicated to opposing planar creatures. Extra-planar hunting abilities.
Wild ranger raised by animals. Feral combat style, enhanced animal empathy.

a: Andyr, Cliffette, Barren, Icelus, Ghreyfain, SimDing0, DawidW, Nythrun, Kulyok; Angel Gryph
sum: Restores 24 pieces of cut BG2/ToB content: quests, dialogues, encounters, and items that Bioware left unfinished or removed before shipping.

co.n: The Kidnapping of Boo by Cliffette
co.no: Restores Minsc quest where Boo is kidnapped. Safe, no known conflicts
co.tp2n: The Kidnapping of Boo by Cliffette

co.no: Restores Valygar/Suna Seni backstory dialogue. Safe

co.n: Kalah and What He Was Promised
co.no: Restores how Kalah acquired powers, activated after circus tent quest. Safe
co.tp2n: Kalah and What He Was Promised

co.n: "Cat and Mouse" (Bodhi hunts you in Spellhold) by Ghreyfain
co.no: Bodhi hunts you during Spellhold escape. Some find the chase annoying but no technical issues
co.tp2n: "Cat and Mouse" (Bodhi hunts you in Spellhold) by Ghreyfain

co.n: Gorje Hilldark and the Extended Illithium Quest
co.no: Alternative illithium source through Gorje Hilldark. Safe
co.tp2n: Gorje Hilldark and the Extended Illithium Quest

co.no: Restores quest offering non-combat approach to Pai'Na. Pai'Na NPC mod has built-in crossmod support — install UB first, then Pai'Na NPC integrates Spider's Bane quest into companion recruitment.
Restores Crooked Crane Inn with gambler NPCs. Overlaps with MiH FR cn:9 Minor Restorations — choose one
Restores multiple encounters: Arkanis Gath, Bodhi, Slum muggers, Hell Hounds, Olive Slimes. Hell Hounds and Olive Slimes also done by MiH FR cn:9
Restores Artemis Entreri in Chapter 6 Bodhi fight. Also done by MiH FR cn:12 and Almateria's RP
Replaces goblins in Prebek's lab with ghasts and flesh golem. Also done by MiH FR cn:9
Restores innate abilities to Irenicus's hell demons and fixes mislead image. Unique to UB

co.n: Gorf the Squisher Fix, by Gebhard Blucher
co.tp2n: Gorf the Squisher Fix, by Gebhard Blucher

co.no: Restores 8+ cut items: Gloves of Missile Snaring, Shazzellim, Wolfskin Bag, etc. Partial overlap with MiH FR cn:4 Item Restorations
Replaces Yoshimo's EE portrait with pre-release original. Overridden by portrait packs
Restores Anomen's original younger portrait. Overridden by portrait packs
Restores portraits for Ryan Trawl, Coran, Safana, Faldorn, Garrick, Xzar, Tiax, Quayle, Suna Seni. Redundant with portrait packs
Fixes creature names: Crazyface, Derrick, Malaaq, Hendron, Maheer, Hannah, Lellyn. Safe
Restores minor dialogues: feral halfling, Anomen reactions, charm spell. Partial overlap with MiH FR cn:9

co.n: Restored Bhaalspawn Powers, by David Gaider
co.no: Restores cut Bhaalspawn abilities from pocket plane challenges. Skip if using Ascension cn:4 (better version) or MiH FR cn:13
co.tp2n: Restored Bhaalspawn Powers, by David Gaider

co.no: Extends truncated ToB item descriptions (11 items). Hard conflict with Item Revisions main component which rewrites these descriptions
Fixes Sarevok soundset scripting, Quiver of Plenty icons, Cold Mistress encounter. Quiver part overlaps with IR but most content is unique
Lawful Good ranger kit with enhanced combat and stealth. Safe, EE-compatible since v28
Feral ranger kit with AC bonuses, rage, animal summoning. Non-LG only. Safe
Sarevok dialogue about Tamoko and Yoshimo's deaths. Overlaps with Ascension cn:2, Turnabout, and Yoshimo's Remorse. Install UB before Ascension

co.n: The Murder of Acton Balthis, by Kulyok
co.no: Detective quest: Haer'Dalis arrested for murder. Turnabout/Yoshimo's Remorse may conflict with cn:24 but this component itself is independent
co.tp2n: The Murder of Acton Balthis, by Kulyok

advisories.reason: NOT a real conflict — Pai'Na NPC has built-in UB crossmod (detects u!spbane.itm). UB adds Spider's Bane quest, Pai'Na NPC integrates it into companion recruitment at quest completion. Install UB before Pai'Na NPC. Complementary, not conflicting.
advisories.source: tp2 analysis: Pai'Na NPC line 295 checks FILE_EXISTS_IN_GAME u!spbane.itm and compiles crossmod/UB.d
